---
title: "bookinger"
subtitle: "`bookinger`"
description: "bookinger"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/bookinger/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                      | Title                        | Type     | Description                                                                                          |
|---------------------------|------------------------------|----------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                   | The unique name of the event | string   | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                   |
| `center`                  | Research center              | string   | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                |
| `book_v1`                 | book_v1                      | datetime | Booking of visit 1. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v2`                 | book_v2                      | datetime | Booking of visit 2. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v3`                 | book_v3                      | datetime | Booking of visit 3. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v4`                 | book_v4                      | datetime | Booking of visit 4. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v5`                 | book_v5                      | datetime | Booking of visit 5. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v6`                 | book_v6                      | datetime | Booking of visit 6. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v7`                 | book_v7                      | datetime | Booking of visit 7. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v8`                 | book_v8                      | datetime | Booking of visit 8. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_hba1c_30weeks`      | book_hba1c_30weeks           | datetime | Booking of visit HbA1c 30 weeks. Workflow.                                                           |
| `book_hba1c_42weeks`      | book_hba1c_42weeks           | datetime | Booking of visit HbA1c 42 weeks. Workflow.                                                           |
| `book_v9`                 | book_v9                      | datetime | Booking of visit 9. Workflow.                                                                        |
| `book_v10`                | book_v10                     | datetime | Booking of visit 10. Workflow.                                                                       |
| `visits_calendar_updates` | visits_calendar_updates      | string   | Whether the visit dates are entered in the ON LiMiT calendar and in project staff Outlook calendars. |
| `remarks_booking`         | remarks_booking              | string   | Remarks regarding bookings.                                                                          |

: Fields in the `bookinger` resource.
